name: Patient Defense

compilation_state.summary: Successfully mapped from SRD 5.1 reference data.

description: You can spend 1 ki point to take the Dodge action as a bonus action on your turn.
lore: A monk's training emphasizes the flow of energy not just for offense, but as a shroud of protection. By focusing their inner reserves, a monk can enter a state of heightened awareness where every incoming strike is anticipated and avoided with fluid grace.
